sourceProvenance.excerpt: Multimodal droplet barcoding enableshigh-throughput linking of single-cell imaging and gene expression

Understanding sequence-function relationships in biology requires large-scale datasets that provide one-to-one mapping between sequence and phenotype. Here, we address this challenge by introducing multimodal droplet barcoding, a strategy that enables individual microfluidic droplets to be tracked across both optical and sequencing measurements. We demonstrate the power of this approach through single-cell analysis, linking single-cell imaging with gene expression profiling at throughputs of hun
